aws_sts_get_caller_identity.description: Print the IAM identity of the caller. Read-only sample operation intended to verify the raw-argv transparent proxy reaches AWS APIs through the configured credentials.

aws_s3_ls.description: List objects under an s3:// URI. Read-only sample operation; the bucket parameter must be an s3:// URI so the raw-argv reverse-match can bind it unambiguously.

aws_ec2_describe_tags.description: Describe EC2 resource tags. Read-only sample operation that demonstrates multi_value_flags: --filters takes several space-separated Name=..,Values=.. entries (e.g. `aws ec2 describe-tags --filters Name=resource-type,Values=instance Name=key,Values=Env`), which the daemon keeps as separate tokens for the host CLI.
